CMS Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) Data Dictionary
Medicaid Enrollee Supplemental File — Conditions Segment
Version — September 2022
SAS name Label Data type Data length Description Value
BENE_ID Encrypted 723 Beneficiary ID (Unique Key) CHAR 15 A unique CCW beneficiary identifier field (BENE_ID) that is specific to the Chronic Condition Warehouse Condition Warehouse ; encrypted prior to delivery to researchers 

The BENE_ID field is used to cross-reference data for each beneficiary across
